description: Projection root for a CSV/TSV file. Document-level CSV dialect metadata is stored here; row content and order are stored in csv_v2_row snapshots.

dialect.description: CSV dialect metadata used to render the file.

delimiter.description: Field delimiter byte encoded as a single Latin-1 character, for example comma or tab.

quote.description: Quote byte encoded as a single Latin-1 character, or null when quoting is disabled.
